shared_attributes.position: center of 128x128 screen, on perch at y=60
shared_attributes.key_features: crest, cheek patch, tail - 3 essential cockatiel traits

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel game
context.role: Unlocked at relationship level 4, triggers when happiness >= 90
context.usage_scenario: Reward behavior for high happiness. Echo sings cockatiel whistle. Plays for 5-10 seconds then returns to idle. Musical note particles float upward. Accompanied by actual cockatiel sound recording.

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel with raised crest, open beak, upright proud posture
visual_specification.texture: Flat pixel art with hand-drawn organic edges, no gradients

animation.description: Frame 1-2: Crest raises, beak opens. Frame 3-4: Beak opens wider (3px gap), head tilts up slightly. Frame 5-6: Beak closes partially. Frame 7-8: Beak opens again, body sways. Rhythmic singing motion.

visual_specification.details: Crest: fully raised, 6-7px tall. Beak: opens to 3px vertical gap in frames 3-4. Head: tilts upward approximately 15 degrees. Eyes: wide open, bright. Body: subtle sway (1-2px) in rhythm. Musical notes (♪ shape, 3x5px #FFEC27) spawn above-right, float upward 8-10px before fading.

relationships.shared_with: Same base body as all Echo states
relationships.differences_from: echo_happy: beak open vs closed, head tilted up vs level, note particles vs heart particles. echo_idle: crest raised vs normal, beak open vs closed. Only state with open beak besides eating.

explicit_negations: No sound wave lines emanating from beak
Musical notes do not multiply excessively (max 3 visible)
Body does not bounce or jump
Beak does not open unrealistically wide (max 3px)
